chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-885 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on CMA 3464/24 2.For orders on office objections,. 3.For orders on CMA 3465/24 4.For hearing of main case. 29-05-2024 Mr. Sajjad Ahmed Khokhar, Advocate for petitioners. ***** 1. Urgency is granted. 2-4. This petition has been filed by petitioners for recovery of payment on account of supply of wheat by them to the respondents department. Petitioners’ counsel has failed to satisfy the Court about maintainability of this petition, as they are seeking recovery of their amount in a Constitutional Petition although their remedy lies in filing Civil Suit. No case for indulgence therefore is made out. Accordingly, this petition along with listed application(s) is dismissed in limine. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
